name: 5"x7" Matted to 4"x6" Ornate Arch Table Frame Antique Brass - Threshold™
description:
Add timeless elegance to your space with the 5"x7" Matted to 4"x6" Ornate Arch Table Frame Antique Brass from Threshold™. Featuring an intricate rectangular antique design, this resin frame showcases a rich gold finish that enhances any decor. Weighing 1.21 pounds, it holds a 4"x6" photo with a matted border for a sophisticated display. Suitable for vertical orientation, it includes an easel back and hanging triangle for versatile placement.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
